notes: OpenBand prioritizes official community sources where possible.
Use storyKey to group duplicate coverage of the same development.
Public Facebook posts can be included when the source is an official public community page and the post has a stable public URL.
communitySources lists every Saskatchewan First Nation tracked by OpenBand so source discovery can expand without creating unverified article cards.

articles.title: Ahtahkakoop Cree Nation posts 2025 election date and notice
articles.summary: Ahtahkakoop Cree Nation posted election information for one Chief and twelve Councillors. The official notice listed election day as June 17, 2025, at the Ahtahkakoop Cree Nation Band Hall, with mail-in ballot and advance poll details available through the community site.

articles.title: Ahtahkakoop lists Traditional Hunting Trip notice
articles.summary: Ahtahkakoop Cree Nation's official News & Alerts area listed a Traditional Hunting Trip scheduled for September 19 to 24, 2025. The item is included as an official community update rather than a traditional news article.

articles.title: Ahtahkakoop lists National Truth and Reconciliation Day notice
articles.summary: The official Ahtahkakoop Cree Nation website listed a National Truth and Reconciliation Day notice for September 30, 2025. OpenBand records it as a community update with the original source attached.

articles.title: Muskoday lists Government of Canada presentation at MFN Band Office
articles.summary: Muskoday First Nation's official events page listed a Government of Canada presentation at the MFN Band Office on May 8, 2025. The record is included as an official public community notice.

articles.title: Muskoday posts community information meeting for members
articles.summary: The Muskoday First Nation events page listed an MFN Information Meeting at Muskoday Band Hall on March 13, 2025. The posting noted supper would be provided and linked to the community information meeting poster.

articles.title: Muskoday lists community information session
articles.summary: Muskoday First Nation's official events page listed a community information session at Muskoday Band Hall on February 13, 2025. The notice stated that all Band members were invited to attend.

articles.title: Treaty Six leaders raise treaty concerns over Alberta separatism
communityAliases: Confederacy of Treaty Six First Nations
articles.summary: The Guardian reported that Treaty Six leaders from Alberta and Saskatchewan met King Charles and raised concerns about treaty obligations in relation to Alberta separatism. OpenBand includes this because the reported development directly involves Treaty Six territories, including Saskatchewan.

articles.title: Muskeg Lake explains early Downtown Event and Entertainment District discussions
articles.summary: Muskeg Lake Cree Nation posted a citizen explainer about early relationship-building and exploratory discussions with the City of Saskatoon on the proposed Downtown Event and Entertainment District. The update states that no final deal, financial commitment, ownership arrangement, or partnership agreement has been approved.

alternateSources.title: Muskeg Lake Cree Nation Statement on Downtown Event and Entertainment District Discussions

articles.title: Muskeg Lake posts ratification vote notice for election and citizenship codes
articles.summary: Muskeg Lake Cree Nation posted a ratification vote notice for members to consider an Election Code and Citizenship Code. The notice frames the vote as part of the Nation’s governance and self-determination work.

articles.title: Onion Lake posts leadership briefing on active Treaty-related claims
articles.summary: Onion Lake Cree Nation posted an Okimâw Pete Chief leadership briefing on active claims connected to Treaty obligations and historical commitments. The update covers Haylands, Treaty agricultural benefits, Treaty annuity discussions, and ongoing negotiations with the Crown.

articles.title: Whitecap opens applications for Community Consultative Group
articles.summary: Whitecap Dakota Nation posted a call for applications to establish a Community Consultative Group tied to its Community Tripartite Agreement with Canada and Saskatchewan on policing provisions. The group is intended to support community safety, well-being, and relationship-building with local policing partners.

articles.title: Whitecap posts update on Jordan’s Principle application changes
articles.summary: Whitecap Dakota Nation posted an update noting changes to Jordan’s Principle application guidelines as of February 10, 2025. The item is included as a public community services update.

articles.title: Cowessess posts Treaty Land Entitlement annual general meeting notice
articles.summary: Cowessess First Nation listed a Treaty Land Entitlement annual general meeting notice on its official news feed. The public update points members to a July 22, 2026 meeting connected to TLE governance and reporting.

articles.title: Cowessess posts annual general meeting notice
articles.summary: Cowessess First Nation posted an annual general meeting notice through its official news feed. The item directs members to a July 29, 2026 public governance meeting.

articles.title: Cowessess lists Adult 12 intake session with Southeast College
articles.summary: Cowessess First Nation listed a Southeast College Adult 12 intake session dated July 9, 2026. The notice is included as an education and training update from the official community site.

articles.title: Cote posts Agricultural Benefits Claim settlement information
articles.summary: Cote First Nation posted information for members on the Agricultural Benefits Claim settlement, including an information session, ratification vote, electronic voting dates, and public document access.

articles.title: Cote asks members for input on transportation services
articles.summary: Cote First Nation listed a Transportation Services Survey asking members for input. The item connects to the Nation’s public transportation service and community infrastructure planning.

articles.title: Cote lists public transportation service update
articles.summary: Cote First Nation listed a public transportation service update on its official site. OpenBand includes it as a community infrastructure and accessibility update.

articles.title: Flying Dust publishes 2025 year-in-review with infrastructure and housing updates
articles.summary: Flying Dust First Nation’s year-in-review lists major community development work including water treatment plant and lift station construction, new housing including a Tiny Home project, development of railway lands, improved Gladue Lake cultural grounds, and a meat shop at the market garden.

articles.title: Flying Dust reports water treatment plant and lift station capital projects
articles.summary: Flying Dust’s capital project update reports construction work on a water treatment plant, raw and treated water mains, lift station replacements, valves and hydrants, and regional solid waste planning. The PDF states the water treatment plant was scheduled for completion by the end of the 2025 calendar year.

articles.title: Mistawasis posts 2024-2025 post-secondary scholarship application notice
articles.summary: Mistawasis Nêhiyawak posted a 2024-2025 scholarship notice for post-secondary students, with applications open to all Mistawasis Nêhiyawak post-secondary students and a May 31, 2025 deadline.

articles.title: Muscowpetung lists Elder utility supplement through housing resources
articles.summary: Muscowpetung Saulteaux Nation’s official site states leadership approved a  Elder utility supplement for registered band members over age sixty-five. OpenBand records it as a housing and member-support update from the community website.

articles.title: Muscowpetung highlights business development division as community resource
articles.summary: Muscowpetung Saulteaux Nation’s official website points members to its business development division and community projects area. The record is included as a source-tracking item for future economic development updates.

communitySources.communityName: Fond du Lac Denesuline First Nation
Mosquito, Grizzly Bear's Head, Lean Man
